limitations
88 = Not attempted due to medical condition or safety concerns
360 GG0170M2_1_STP_GOAL_CD GG0170M2_1_STP_GOAL_CD GG0170M2 Discharge Goal 1 Step Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal to step over a curb or up and down one step. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal to step over a curb or up and down one step. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching
